---
title: Digital Garden
format: live-html
execute:
  echo: false
pyodide:
  packages:
    - matplotlib
    - numpy
    - cowsay
---

```{pyodide}
#| autorun: true
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

x = np.random.normal(170, 10, 250)
plt.hist(x)
plt.show()
```
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof cow_text = Inputs.text(
  {
    value: "Hello world",
    label: "Cow says:",
  }
)
```

```{pyodide}
#| autorun: true
#| input:
#|   - cow_text
import cowsay

print(cowsay.get_output_string("cow", cow_text))
```
